name: Buang Nareumit
overview: Kwanuma, a famous actress, becomes drawn into the story of a novel while preparing for her role in the drama Roy Adeed, and unexpectedly meets Theeratch, a crew member, discovering a mysterious connection that mirrors the novel’s tale.

trailers.title: บ่วงนฤมิต | เริ่ม 2 มกราคม นี้ | Ch3Thailand
